tagline: Advancing plant physiology through rigorous experimentation, analytical precision, and reproducible research.
mission: We investigate how crop and model plant systems respond to environmental variability by integrating controlled-environment experiments, quantitative phenotyping, analytical chemistry, and careful statistical design.
piBio: Professor Elena Marquez leads the lab with a research program spanning stress physiology, germplasm diversity, and measurement-centered experimental workflows for translational crop science.
location: Colegio de Postgraduados, Montecillo, Texcoco, Estado de México, Mexico
responseTime: We typically respond to academic and collaboration inquiries within 3 to 5 business days.

hero.description: The Crop Physiology Lab studies plant performance across water limitation, salinity, and managed growth environments, with a focus on credible inference, transparent methods, and graduate training.
